title: Seven & i shares end 3.6% higher on report of stake talks with Polish convenience chain Zabka
summary_full: Shares of Seven & i Holdings Co. jumped after a report said the company was looking to buy a stake in Poland's Zabka Group.
summary_public: Shares of Seven & i Holdings Co. jumped after a report said the company was looking to buy a stake in Poland's Zabka Group.

PL.label: neutral
PL.evidence: stake talks with Polish convenience chain Zabka
